description: Product Description The fragrance features violet, jasmine, lily of the valley and watermelon. The fragrance features violet, jasmine, lily of the valley and watermelon. The fragrance features violet, jasmine, lily of the valley and watermelon. Ingredients Alcohol Denat, Aqua, Parfum, Benzyl Salicylate, Alpha-Ismethyl Ionone, Hydroxycitronellal, Amyl Cinnamal, Citronellol, Geraniol, Coumarin, Linalool, Benzyl Benzoate, Limonene, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, M74140 Directions Spray the perfume on the pulse points (wrists, neck and inner sides of the elbows).
